channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Disgusting amount of rubbish, 14th March
item.description:
This path between Plumstead and the riverside is heavily littered and looks neglected. I regularly walk here with a buggy because it should be a quick, pleasant route, but the amount of rubbish along the path and in the vegetation is unacceptable. Please arrange for this area to be cleaned and maintained. It is an important pedestrian route and currently creates a very poor environment for residents and families using it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tom Cribb Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large dog poo, 14th March
item.description:
Large 3 pieces of dog poo on pavement been trodden in and been there for over a week now. Absolutely disgusting. It needs a jet wash.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 94, Bladindon Drive, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Santander bike, 14th March
item.description:
Worsley zbridge Road on the side of Sydenham School playing fields and opposite entrance to Chrystal palace training ground. Please clear a Santander cycle

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worsley Bridge Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fox dead in middle of road, 14th March
item.description:
Concerns people will try to swerve when passing as it is in the middle of the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gravel Hill, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 40 brooksville avenue, NW6 6TG, 14th March
item.description:
Mattress and bin bags left on pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brooksville Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Loads of cardboard on the pavement, 14th March
item.description:
There is loads of boxes all over the pavement blocking the path . This has blown all over the place please could this be addressed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prestbury Square, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
On the corner of ravensworth road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wayside Grove, Elmstead, Greater London

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wayside Grove, Elmstead, Greater London

item.title: Childs chair and black bags all over grass, 14th March
item.description:
Large children chair and loads of plastic. Bags on grass
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prestbury Square, Elmstead, Greater London

item.title: Hoover and rubbish been dumped on grass, 14th March
item.description:
Hoover , walking stick and rubbish on the grass. Smarden grove. Dunkery road end
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Smarden Drove, Elmstead, Greater London

item.title: Large box left on grass, 14th March

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prestbury Square, Elmstead, Greater London

item.title: Overflowing bin and rubbish on pavement, 14th March
item.description:
Bin on pavement blocking path, plus overflowing rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queens Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Much of St Aidans Road Pavement is in a terrible condition, 14th March
item.description:
Much of the pavement in St Aidans Road is a terrible trip hazard due to the poor condition of paving. The tree roots have caused some of the issue but paving is also cracked and in terrible repair in other areas. This is a health and safety concern.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, St Aidan's Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 14th March
item.description:
Litter left by bench, which is below the path facing down over open ground. Litter is regularly left here. A bin would be helpful.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glassmill Lane, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging bushes onto pavement, 14th March
item.description:
St Dunstans Road 78 - 82 . Overhanging bushes dramatically reduce width of pavement .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunstan's Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Remains of fires along this path and debris left. and debris left, presumably to do with drug taking. presumably, 14th March
item.description:
Someone has been making fires along this path, presumably to do with drugs, and debris left. Another fire beside the bin on the down path. They have been there for several days at least.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glassmill Lane, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woldham Road, Widmore, Greater London

item.title: Streetlight not working again, 14th March
item.description:
Outside 20 Leybourne close. Not working g for 3 days.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leybourne Close, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
